## Changes

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `python -m compileall -q src` passes
- [ ] CLI continues to have **zero runtime dependencies** (or new dep is behind an `[extra]`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] README updated for any new flag, behavior, or install step
- [ ] No real chat content (phone numbers, names, message text) included in this PR or its tests
